creator: agh@riseup.net
text:
(In reply to Roman Bogorodskiy from comment #13)

Yes, a double tab was from removed from ${ADBLOCK_DESC} due to a warning from portlint.

I am still stuck with tracing a boot panic, and an old classic (root mount hang on CAM) on my 15-CURRENT desktop/build box, so I might be a few more days away before I can continue, if someone else beats me, awesome, otherwise I will work at all the suggestions when I can.

Thanks.
